packages.name: lucide-react
packages.suggested_use: All UI icons — social links (GitHub, Linkedin, Twitter, Mail), navigation, accordion chevrons, external-link indicators

assets.name: Google Fonts — Space Grotesk
assets.attribution_text: Space Grotesk by Florian Karsten, licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1 (https://scripts.sil.org/OFL)
assets.suggested_use: Headings and display text — hero greeting, section titles, card titles. Body uses system font stack.

notes: Consumer-facing personal portfolio/blog with a brutalist aesthetic. The spec explicitly prohibits stock photos, hero illustrations, gradients, and rounded blobs — emojis are the visual system. Scouted only what the spec calls for: Lucide for UI/social icons (GitHub, LinkedIn, X, Mail, chevrons) and Space Grotesk from Google Fonts for headings. No illustrations or photos downloaded — the spec's 'No stock photos. No hero illustrations.' directive means zero image assets are appropriate.
